title: Taylor Swift Confirms India Leg of Eras Tour — Mumbai & Delhi Dates Revealed
excerpt: Global pop superstar Taylor Swift is set to bring her record-breaking Eras Tour to India for the first time, with two massive shows confirmed in Mumbai and Delhi this October.
content:
In what music fans across India are calling the announcement of the decade, Taylor Swift has officially confirmed two blockbuster dates in India as part of the extended run of her Eras Tour. The shows are scheduled for October 14 in Mumbai at the DY Patil Stadium and October 17 in New Delhi at Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium.

The announcement sent Indian Swifties into an absolute frenzy, with #TaylorSwiftIndia trending within minutes on X (formerly Twitter). Over 2 million fans joined the virtual queue when pre-sale tickets went live, crashing the BookMyShow platform for nearly three hours.

A Long-Awaited Moment

Swift has been vocal about her love for Indian culture and her massive fanbase in the country. In a recent interview, she said,

The Eras Tour, which became the first concert tour in history to gross over $1 billion, has been reimagined for the India leg with additional production elements and a special Bollywood-inspired segment rumored to be in the works.

Ticket Prices & Availability

Ticket prices range from ₹4,999 for general standing to ₹45,000 for VIP packages. A limited number of front-row platinum seats are priced at ₹1,25,000. General sale begins July 15 at 10:00 AM IST via BookMyShow and Paytm Insider.

Economic Impact

The Federation of Indian Chambers of Commerce and Industry (FICCI) estimates that Taylor Swift's two-city visit could inject over ₹2,000 crore into the Indian economy through tourism, hospitality, merchandise, and ancillary sectors — a 'Swift Effect' similar to what was witnessed in cities across North America, Europe, and Australia.

Hotels near both stadium venues have already seen a 300% spike in bookings from international fans planning to fly in, with travel packages from the USA, UK, UAE, and Singapore selling out within hours of the announcement.

Opening Acts

Bollywood sensation Diljit Dosanjh is confirmed as the opening act for the Mumbai show, marking a historic crossover moment. The Delhi opener is yet to be announced, with Arijit Singh's name circulating heavily in fan communities.

Stay tuned to StarScoop Daily for live updates, ticket tips, and exclusive behind-the-scenes coverage leading up to the biggest concert event India has ever witnessed.

metaDescription: Taylor Swift confirms India Eras Tour dates — Mumbai on Oct 14 and Delhi on Oct 17. Tickets, prices, opening acts, and everything you need to know.
